summary: Frontend-only code review for Homepage quick actions update and Prescription Manager booking icons. All features correctly implemented. Google OAuth required for UI testing.

findings: ✅ 'Consult Doctor' with Stethoscope icon, links to https://www.encarelife.com/doctor-consultation (line 307)
✅ 'Book Lab Test' with FlaskConical icon, links to https://www.encarelife.com/lab-booking (line 308)
✅ 'Buy Devices' with Heart icon, links to https://www.encarelife.com/shop/category/healthcare-devices-4 (line 309)
✅ 'Personal Care' with Sparkles icon, links to https://www.encarelife.com/shop/category/personal-care-3 (line 310)
✅ All quick actions have external: true flag
✅ External links open with window.open(route, '_blank', 'noopener,noreferrer') (line 448)
✅ Buy Medicine CTA section added below quick actions (lines 465-502)
✅ Gradient design: from-rose-500 via-pink-500 to-orange-400 (line 467)
✅ ShoppingBag icon with 'Buy Medicine' title (lines 472-473)
✅ 'Save ₹___ Now' text displays conditionally when medicationSavings.hasSavings is true (lines 475-481)
✅ 'Shop Now' button navigates to /medications page (line 489)
✅ data-testid='buy-medicine-cta-btn' present (line 491)
✅ medicationSavings calculation implemented with useMemo (lines 314-371)
✅ Stethoscope icon (cyan) for 'Book Doctor Consultation' per user row (lines 869-875)
✅ FlaskConical icon (indigo) for 'Book Lab Test' per user row (lines 876-882)
✅ handleBookDoctor handler opens doctor booking modal (lines 210-214)
✅ handleBookLabTest handler opens lab test booking modal (lines 216-219)
✅ Modal with Stethoscope icon and cyan theme (lines 1810-1930)
✅ Form fields: Doctor Name (required), Date (required), Time (required), Notes (optional)
✅ Submits to /api/appointments with type: 'doctor' (lines 1838-1850)
✅ Cancel and Book Consultation buttons present
✅ Modal with FlaskConical icon and indigo theme (lines 1933-2073)

✅ Test Type dropdown with options: HbA1c, Fasting Blood Sugar, Post Prandial Blood Sugar, Lipid Profile, Kidney Function Test, Liver Function Test, Thyroid Profile, Complete Blood Count, Other (lines 1990-2006)
✅ Form fields: Test Type (required), Lab Name (required), Date (required), Time (required), Notes (optional)
✅ Submits to /api/appointments with type: 'lab' (lines 1961-1972)
✅ Cancel and Book Lab Test buttons present

action_items: MINOR: Add data-testid attributes to quick action buttons for better testability (e.g., data-testid='quick-action-consult-doctor')
MINOR: Add data-testid attributes to doctor/lab booking icons in prescription manager
critical_code_review_comments: All requested features are correctly implemented
External links correctly use window.open with '_blank' and 'noopener,noreferrer' for security
Buy Medicine CTA section has proper gradient styling and conditional savings display
Doctor and Lab booking modals have proper form validation and API integration
context_for_next_testing_agent: All homepage quick actions and prescription manager booking features are correctly implemented. To manually test: 1) Login with Google OAuth, 2) On homepage, verify 4 quick actions (Consult Doctor, Book Lab Test, Buy Devices, Personal Care) open external links in new tabs, 3) Verify Buy Medicine CTA section is visible with gradient design and Shop Now button navigates to /medications, 4) Login as admin (diabexpertonline@gmail.com), go to /prescription-manager, 5) Verify Stethoscope (cyan) and FlaskConical (indigo) icons appear for each user, 6) Click icons to test booking modals with form fields.
